issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' (opponent attacks you), not 'OnAttacked' (you are attacked). Card text states '[On Your Opponent's Attack]' which indicates the opponent is performing the attack action.

Condition type is 'HasRestingDon' but card text specifies 'DON!! −1' which means paying/spending 1 DON!! from your field. This should be 'HasAttachedDon' with count 1, representing DON!! cards on your field available to return to deck.
Filter uses 'maxCost' but should use 'maxCost' (this is correct); however, verify that 'Baroque Works' is the exact subType string used in official card database.
